verse.name: V1
C2
verse.lines: Glory! Glory, hallelujah! Glory! Glory, hallelujah! Glory! Glory, hallelujah! His Truth is marching on.

verse.name: V3
V4
verse.lines: He has sounded forth the trumpet that shall never sound retreat; He is sifting out the hearts of men before His judgment seat; Oh be swift, my soul, to answer Him! be jubilant, my feet! Our God is marching on.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: In the beauty of the lilies Christ was born across the sea, With a glory in His bosom that transfigures you and me; As He died to make men holy, let us die to make men free; While God is marching on.
